title: Paradoc's Tomes
description: A Datapack providing some basic tomes for Minecraft.
body:
Adds Three Tomes to Minecraft, as well as some advancements to get you going.

The goal of this pack was to be a little more special than vanilla while still feeling fairly vanilla in nature.

Tomes Added:
- Fireball Tome
  - Found in Nether Fortresses
  - Consumes 1 Lapis Lazuli
  - Shoots 3 fireballs
- Fang Tome
  - Found in Woodland Mansions
  - Consumes 1 Lapis Lazuli
  - When facing forwards, summons a row of Evoker Fangs in front of the player
  - When facing upwards or downwards, summons a ring of Evoker Fangs around the player
- Warp Tome
  - Found in End Cities
  - Consumes 1 Lapis Lazuli
  - Teleports the player on top of, or on bottom of, a block in the direction the player is facing.
  - Limited range
  - Ignores some blocks
  - Holding shift while using will display a pointer where the maximum teleportation distance is.
